title: Frostbitten Nightmares
description: This modpack is the ultimate blend of horror, survival, and bone-chilling cold.
body:
# Need a super high performance and easy Minecraft server at a good price? Try [godlike.host](https://godlike.host/?aff_id=1323) now!
![GodLike.Host](https://godlike.host/wp-content/uploads/2023/06/godlike_logo_horizontal_join_ua_v1.png)

This new modpack combines chilly non-stop blizzards with horror. It adds over 100 horror mods, if you dare... Try surviving this! It's designed to be hard. Have a low end PC? It's optimized for that too. We've combined non-stop blizzards, optimizations, and horror for the best experience. We hope you enjoy this modpack. Here are some of the entities in the pack: The Man From The Fog, Knocker, Better Cave Dweller, Sea Stalker, Starved Stalker, Midnight Lurker, The Pale Hound, The One Who Watches, Doctor Who: Weeping Angels, Friday the 13th: Jason Voorhees, From The Fog, and many more.
